name: Hellenic Company for Telecommunications and Telematic Applications S.A.
summary: Hellenic Company for Telecommunications and Telematic Applications S.A., together with its subsidiaries, provides telecommunications and pay-TV services to small and medium-sized enterprises, and private consumers in Greece. It offers Internet services, such as Internet access, Internet leased lines, data connectivity services, LMDS, etc., as well as fixed telephony and data services. The company also provides digital radio-television and/or audiovisual services; owns and broadcasts the Novasports channels; and offers content acquisition and customer support services, as well as provides satellite services. Hellenic Company for Telecommunications and Telematic Applications S.A. was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Pallini, Greece.
